{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Renfei's Remnant
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Renfei's Remnant]] dissolved into [[essence]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
